name: Greedy Glutton
description:
I’m going to level with everyone this one time. I love transformation, obviously. But what do I love more than transformation? Transforming with weight gain added into the mix! Absolute units, heckin chonkers, certified fatasses, I don’t give a damn! If I’m playing a transformation scenario that transforms me into something chonky, it’s fantasy for me.

...I hope that wasn’t too weird for everyone to hear me admit...

Anyway, yeah, Greedent TF Scenario. Pretty much caters to everything I just said.
creator: SacredSean
